sourceMovie.title: For Your Eyes Only
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: For Your Eyes Only works as a adventure movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The adventure and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Skyfall
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If For Your Eyes Only clicked for you, Skyfall (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after For Your Eyes Only?
faq.answer: Try Skyfall, Spectre, Quantum of Solace—each shares DNA with For Your Eyes Only while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is For Your Eyes Only?
faq.answer: For Your Eyes Only (1981) is best described as Adventure, Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is For Your Eyes Only part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "James Bond Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
